query: how much did we spend on purchase orders last quarter?
expected_behavior: Loads maximo-procurement with maximo-overview as parent
Surfaces the cost-basis ambiguity before answering: LINECOST (pretax) vs LOADEDCOST (incl. freight) vs TOTALCOST, and whether tax (TAX1-5) is included
Surfaces the date ambiguity: PO order date vs receipt date vs invoice date
Notes the canonical cost field is governed by the RECEIPLINEORLOADED MAXVAR (a maximo-setup deployment fact), and does not silently pick one
